snippet.description:
Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old


Stream & Download "7 Years" by Lukas Graham: https://lukasgraham.ln...

Lets Support and Follow Lukas Graham:
https://www.instagram.com/lukasgraham
https://www.x.com/lukasgraham
https://www.facebook.com/lukasgraham

#7Years #LukasGraham #Lyrics #TikTok #Tiktokhymn

Lyrics:
Lukas Graham
"7 Years"

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

It was a big big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich so we were out to make that steady figure

Once I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
"Go get yourself a wife or you'll be lonely"
Once I was eleven years old

I always had that dream, like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once I was twenty years old

(Lukas Graham!)

I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once I was twenty years old

Soon we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon we'll be thirty years old

I'm still learning about life
My woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs
And I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me
Some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind
My brother, I'm still sorry

Soon I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life, and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

Once I was seven years old

snippet.title: The Equalizer 4 (2026) | Denzel Washington, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jason Statham | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#equalizer4 #denzelwashington #concepttrailer 

Watch This The Equalizer 4 Fan Made Concept Trailer (2026)

Robert McCall thought he had buried every ghost from his past deep enough that they would never claw their way back to the surface — but some graves refuse to stay closed, and the man stepping off a private jet in Boston Harbor with a small army behind him is the one ghost that McCall never prepared himself to face again. Arnold Schwarzenegger as Viktor Lazarov is not just another crime lord with delusions of empire; he is the man who fought beside Robert McCall thirty years ago in black operations so classified that even the agencies who authorized them pretend they never happened, a brother in arms who took a different path when the missions ended and built a criminal organization that now stretches across four continents. Denzel Washington returns with that same quiet lethality that has defined this franchise, but there is something different in his eyes when he looks at Viktor — this is not the cold calculation of a man facing an enemy, this is the heartbreak of a man facing a friend who chose to become everything they once swore to destroy. The betrayal cuts deeper than any blade because Viktor knows every single technique McCall uses, trained in the same programs, survived the same nightmares, and has spent decades preparing for the day when he would finally settle the score with the one man who refused to join him when the agency burned their identities and left them for dead. Arnold brings a weathered menace to this role that transforms Viktor into something far more tragic than a simple villain; this is a man who genuinely believes McCall abandoned him, who built an empire from the ashes of that abandonment, and who now wants his former brother to watch everything he protects crumble before the final bullet finds its home.

Jason Statham as Marcus Cole is the solution Viktor designed specifically for the McCall problem — an assassin raised from childhood in Eastern European kill programs, engineered to be faster, younger, and more brutal than anything the old guard ever produced, a weapon pointed directly at a man who has never faced someone trained specifically to counter his methods. The confrontations between McCall and Cole are surgical and savage; every hardware store becomes a battlefield, every quiet neighborhood becomes a kill zone, and the nineteen-second countdown that McCall runs in his head keeps getting interrupted by an opponent who has studied those nineteen seconds until he can predict each movement before it happens. Anne Hathaway as Sarah Chen brings the CIA into the crossfire — a handler who knows exactly what Robert McCall used to be because she inherited the classified files when she took over the division, and now she must decide whether to help a ghost from her agency's darkest chapter or let Viktor's army finally put him down. Sarah is not a damsel requiring rescue; she is a field operative with her own body count and her own moral compromises, and her alliance with McCall is built on mutual necessity rather than trust. The streets of Boston run red as old loyalties collide with new vendettas, as a friendship forged in blood becomes a war that neither man can walk away from, and as Robert McCall faces the terrifying possibility that the one opponent he cannot equalize is the mirror image of everything he used to be. So tell us honestly — when the past comes calling with an army and a grudge three decades deep, can even the Equalizer balance a debt written in brotherhood and betrayal?

Disclaimer: This concept trailer is entirely a fan-made creation for creative and entertainment purposes only and was neither created by nor affiliated with Sony Pictures, Columbia Pictures, Escape Artists, or any official production teams related to The Equalizer franchise. big (take off) from the (offset) and i bought (migos) wimme

I wrote this smiling

and relive life then i would

but at least all of us were good

you know the rest of that line so fuck it

i’m a nuisance don’t do sips I chug it
She got new lips to use em and suck it 
Double D’s sit in the chub they all snuggish
I can turn this into a zoo the fans jump 
We can do what you wanna do i ain’t fussed
Me i ain’t a regular dude she do love
I go down if i’m in the mood the cooch chuffed 
There’s nuttin like an ArrDee party who’s Puff
My girls turn up and take their own drugs 
I do what i want
I ain’t changed up 
Come from have fuck all to do
So it still ain’t enough

snippet.title: FIREFLY REBOOT TRAILER 2028
snippet.description:
Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. New Episodes, Firefly Reboot Episode 1 Teaser, Nathan Fillion Mal Reynolds, Gina Torres, Alan Tudyk, Morena Baccarin, Jewel Staite, Adam Baldwin, Sean Maher & Summer Glau & what happened after The Serenity Movie 2005 ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe

Masters Of The Universe Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEPEM1BoBuo&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=11&pp=iAQB2AauBLAIAg%3D%3D
Avengers Doomsday X-Men Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hz5IpqEri2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0qPeNpdeIo0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=5&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering new Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. Nathan Fillion Malcolm "Mal" Reynolds, Gina Torres Zoe Alleyne Washburne, Alan Tudyk Hoban "Wash" Washburne, Morena Baccarin Inara Serra, Adam Baldwin Jayne Cobb, Jewel Staite Kaywinnet Lee "Kaylee" Frye, Sean Maher Simon Tam, Summer Glau River Tam and more returning cast from the original series.

Disney Plus Release, Firefly Reboot currently titled Firefly Still Flyin and Episode 1 Athenia Title Explained. What happened after the events of the Serenity Movie 2005. Firefly Comics Explained, the Firefly comics continued the story after the events of the Serenity Movie with Mal and Inara together, Zoe having Wash's Baby Emma, Kaylee and Simon together, River Tam pilot of the Serenity. The crew still on the run from the Alliance, and rogue psychics from the alliance like River Tam with the same powers and abilities. Revealing there were way more people they experimented on.

Several characters return including Chiwetel Ejiofor's The Operative, and we learn more about the backstory of Book's character. And other questions raised during the original Firefly series and later Serenity Movie that were never answered or explored in depth.

Alan Tudyk is returning as Wash, but they have not explained how he is alive again. If the series will take place before the Serenity Movie, or if they will include his character in the new series in some other way. But he will participate in the series.

Marc Guggenheim from Arrow, The Flash, Supergirl, Legends of Tomorrow and the other Arrowverse projects is showrunning with his IRL wife Tara Butters, who did Agent Carter, Joss Whedon's Dollhouse, The Boys Gen V and other shows. 

Joss Whedon is not currently returning, but Nathan Fillion has said he gave his blessing for them to continue Firefly. And they got the legal rights from Fox and Disney to make the series. And are currently figuring out season 1 with an estimated 2028-2029 release date.

I'll do more Firefly Reboot videos as we learn more about the series and get a trailer or teaser of some kind. Nathan Fillion and the rest of the cast will continue talking about it until then too.

Lots more DC and Marvel Trailers coming Supergirl Trailer 2026, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, and Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon too!

Marc Guggenheim from Arrow, The Flash, Supergirl, Legends of Tomorrow and the other Arrowverse projects is showrunning with his IRL wife Tara Butters, who did Agent Carter, Joss Whedon's Dollhouse, The Boys Gen V and other shows. 

Joss Whedon is not currently returning, but Nathan Fillion has said he gave his blessing for them to continue Firefly. And they got the legal rights from Fox and Disney to make the series. And are currently figuring out season 1 with an estimated 2028-2029 release date.

I'll do more Firefly Reboot videos as we learn more about the series and get a trailer or teaser of some kind. Nathan Fillion and the rest of the cast will continue talking about it until then too.

Lots more DC and Marvel Trailers coming Supergirl Trailer 2026, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, and Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon too!

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Lyrics: 🎵 

[Intro: Lil Wayne, Chris Brown]
Young Mula, baby!
(Let me see)
Haha
You thought it was over?
(Let me see)

[Verse 1: Lil Wayne, Chris Brown]
I wasn't born last night
I know these hoes ain't right
But you was blowin' up her phone last night
But she ain't have her ringer nor her ring on last night, ooh
N*gga, that's that nerve
Why give a b*tch your heart when she'd rather have a purse?
Why give a b*tch an inch when she'd rather have nine?
You know how the game goes, she be mine by halftime
I'm the shit, ooh
N*gga, that's that nerve
You all about her, and she all about hers
Birdman Junior in this b*tch, no flamingos
And I done did everythin' but trust these hoes (Let me see)
CB, f*ck with me

[Chorus: Chris Brown]
When a rich n*gga want you
And your n*gga can't do nothin' for ya
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal
Woah, these hoes ain't loyal
Yeah-yeah, let me see

[Refrain: Chris Brown]
Just got rich
Took a broke n*gga b*tch
I can make a broke b*tch rich
But I don't f*ck with broke b*tches

[Verse 2: Chris Brown]
Got a white girl with some fake titties
I took her to the Bay with me
Eyes closed, smokin' marijuana
Rollin' up that Bob Marley, I'm a rasta
She wanna do drugs (Drugs)
Smoke weed, get drunk (Wasted)
She wanna see a n*gga trap
She wanna f*ck all the rappers (Let me see)

[Chorus: Chris Brown]
(Uh-huh)
When a rich n*gga want you (Want you, baby)
And your n*gga can't do nothin' for ya (Nothin', no)
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal (No, they ain't)
Woah, these hoes ain't loyal
Yeah-yeah, let me see

[Verse 3: Chris Brown]
Black girl with a big booty
If she a bad b*tch, let's get to it (Right away)
We up in this club
Bring me the bottles
I know, girl, that you came in this b*tch with your man
That's a no-no, girl
All this money in the air
I wanna see you dance
[Refrain: Chris Brown]
Just got rich (Got rich)
Took a broke n*gga b*tch (Yeah)
I can make a broke b*tch rich
But I don't f*ck with broke b*tches (Girl, it's you)

[Chorus: Chris Brown]
(Uh-huh)
When a rich n*gga want you (Yeah-yeah, want you, baby)
And your n*gga can't do nothin' for ya (No, nothin', no-woah)
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal (Oh-oh-oh-oh-no)
Woah, these hoes ain't loyal
Yeah-yeah-yeah-yeah-yeah
Yeah-yeah, let me see

[Verse 4: Tyga]
(Ha!) Rich young n*gga
Name got bigger and my change got bigger, so my chains got bigger
Ferrari, Jaguar, switchin' four lanes
With the top down screamin' out, "Money ain't a thing" (Ha!)
Ha, me and CB in the Bay with her (Bay with her)
I sent her back home so you can lay with her
Okay, let's talk about this ice that I'm carryin'
All these karats like I'm a f*ckin' vegetarian
Shout-out Weezy F., keep a redbone wet
Rose Rolex, hoes on deck, she know I got a check
Do it too good when she ride that dick (Woo)
Man, I wouldn't trust that b*tch, no (Haha)
[Bridge: Chris Brown]
Come on, come on, girl, why you frontin'?
Baby, show me somethin'
When I call her, she gon' leave
And I bet that bottom dollar she gon' cheat
Come on, come on, girl, why you frontin'?
Baby, show me somethin'
You done spent your bread on her
And it's all for nothin' (Yeah-yeah-yeah-yeah, let me see)

[Chorus: Chris Brown]
(Uh-huh)
When a rich n*gga want you (Want you, baby, yeah, woo)
And your n*gga can't do nothin' for ya (Can't do nothin' for you)
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal (Oh, no)
Woah, these hoes ain't loyal
Yeah-yeah, let me see (Woo)
(Uh-huh)
When a rich n*gga want you (Want you, baby, yeah)
And your n*gga can't do nothin' for ya (Oh-woah-oh)
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal (They be playin' games, yeah)
Woah, these hoes ain't loyal (Oh-oh)
Yeah-yeah, let me see

[Outro: Chris Brown]
Yeah, let me see
Yeah-ah, let me see
Let me see
Oh, these hoes ain't loyal
Let me see

Jamie Oliver petrol station
I needed deli but god I hate him
That man should not have his face on posters
I feel so angry or sad at most huh

But then I think of the New York skyline
The west cork of the Yankee eyeline
Then get to thinking I have been wrong tho
Let me explain cuz I’m never wrong tho

Things are ugly to me I get it
A flip phone with a lack of credit
And others beautiful I remember
Blanch right at the end of December

So OK don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids 
And they wouldn’t like this
I’m saying OK don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids 
And they wouldn’t like this


This is making no sense to the average listener
Let me try to explain myself in a few words

I make up places like Finglas, Tennessee
A mish mash of what should and shouldn’t be
Cuz smoking area concerned glances
‘She’s really mental its not just acting’

There’s always something I’m missing out on
Overdosing on social Calpol
Overeager to make acquaintance
With someone normal and nice who’ll explain it

You like forgetting one day you’ll stop breathin’
And you’ll have wasted your time on seethin’
I said I’m wasting my time on seething
And hey, you’re not so good yourself, come learn my mantra

It’s like 
OK dont be a bitch
The man’s got kids 
And they wouldn’t like this
So OK don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids 
And they wouldn’t like this

I’m still not explaining myself very well at all
Let me try, let me try again, let me try

It’s the fear of not getting the dole and the joy of then chopping it up with the card that you draw it on
Coming through town and then seeing the type of the people you missed who’d have died back in Dublin
The jeans that I’m wearing are very expensive, it’s not a reflection reflection reflection
Sinead in Ratoath and Sinead in the sky the Sineads that I’ll meet on the by and by 
And the fear of the freedom of being released again, feel seventeen again, washing the sheets with the
Lies that I don’t even know that I’ve told cuz I’ve mixed them all up, yeah the cactus is cold

It’s like
OK don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids
And they wouldn’t like this
I’m saying
OK don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids 
And they wouldn’t like this
I’m saying 
Ciara don’t be a bitch
The man’s got kids
And they wouldn’t like this
